zh.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight是John Merovingian的兒子，於1480年出生在英國英格蘭。他於1501年與Jennifer Conaway在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight是John Merovingian的儿子，于1480年出生在英国英格兰。他于1501年与Jennifer Conaway在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: Chuck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: now usually taken as a pet form of Charles . It was originally a nickname, from an English term of endearment (as in Shakespeare's phrase ‘dearest chuck’), probably from Middle English chukken ‘to cluck’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight was born in 1480, in England, United Kingdom as the son of John Merovingian. He married Jennifer Conaway in 1501, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight est né en 1480, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Merovingian. Il a épousé Jennifer Conaway en 1501, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight wurde 1480 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Merovingian geboren. Er hat 1501 in England Jennifer Conaway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight è nato il nel 1480 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Merovingian. Lui sposato Jennifer Conaway nel 1501, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knightは1480年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Merovingianの息子として生まれた。1501年にイギリスでJennifer Conawayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight(은)는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Merovingian의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1501년 영국에서 Jennifer Conaway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight nasceu em 1480, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Merovingian. Ele casou-se com Jennifer Conaway em 1501, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight родился в 1480 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John Merovingian. Он женился на женщине по имени Jennifer Conaway в 1501 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Chuck William Knight nació en 1480, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Merovingian. Se casó con Jennifer Conaway en 1501, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
